subject: Addressing Client Communication at Gallardo Law Firm
body: I've noticed that immigration law firms often receive feedback about communication delays regarding case updates. This can lead to client frustration and potential reputational risk. Clarion helps by converting client feedback into actionable governance insights. Our weekly governance brief identifies these communication patterns and provides your leadership with clear action items. If you're open to it, I can walk through what that would look like using a sample of your firm's public reviews.
